session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, the air is heavy with an almost palpable sense of mystery and vastness, as the waves stretch out before you like an endless canvas of darkness punctuated only by the faintest glint of stars above. The sound of the water lapping against the shore creates a soothing melody that seems to hum in harmony with the beating of your own heart, while the darkness itself feels almost alive, a living, breathing entity that wraps around you like a shroud. As you stand there, frozen in the stillness, the universe seems to shrink down to a single moment, leaving only the vast expanse of the ocean and its secrets waiting to be unraveled.
